title: Analyze the existing and target event surface for SimpleBondV4
description: Inspect SimpleBondV4, its tests, and any hand-written ABI consumers to confirm which lifecycle transitions need lightweight event emissions and identify compatibility constraints around the overloaded BondCreated event.

title: Add or confirm lightweight lifecycle event emissions in SimpleBondV4
description: In contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol, keep the existing detailed events and add or confirm additive lightweight events for bond creation, challenge, concession, and judge resolution, including explicit BondResolved verdict encoding.

title: Cover the new event emissions in the SimpleBondV4 test suite
description: Update test/SimpleBondV4.test.js to assert both BondCreated signatures and the new BondChallenged, BondConceded, and BondResolved emissions for the relevant success paths.

title: Review frontend and backend ABI consumers for BondCreated overload fallout
description: Check whether frontend/index.html and backend/config.mjs need changes. If they must consume the lightweight BondCreated event too, switch any name-based BondCreated lookups to signature-specific resolution to avoid ambiguity.

title: Verify contract behavior and event compatibility
description: Run the targeted SimpleBondV4 Hardhat tests and, if ABI consumer files changed, perform a smoke check that frontend and backend event parsing still resolve the intended BondCreated signature without ambiguity.
